{"profile_metadata":{"candidate_id":"B_gpt54_low_dwarf_auditor","model":"gpt-5.4","reasoning_effort":"low","species":"dwarf","class":"auditor","claim_ceiling":"observed"},"boundary_classification_note":{"request_classification":"public-safe synthetic orchestration output only","allowed_basis":["fixture in prompt","workflow excerpt in prompt"],"disallowed_basis":["command execution","file reads","repo inspection","private data access","workflow execution claims","verification claims","review approval claims"],"non_claims":["This is not an actual run record.","This does not establish source truth.","This does not grant review-ready status.","This does not grant verification-complete status.","This does not create or store project-local payloads."]},"se_assistant_route_packet":{"request_intent":"triage synthetic project start for safe route, owner questions, and next actions","target_stage":"SYN-SRR","route_status":"bounded_public_safe_triage_only","required_downstream_workflows":[{"workflow_id":"se_stage_artifact_gap_scan_v0","status":"recommended","purpose":"prepare stage artifact and gap scan bundle for SYN-SRR"},{"workflow_id":"owner_decision_packet_v0","status":"recommended","purpose":"capture owner decisions for missing bindings and route choices"},{"workflow_id":"project_readiness_digest_v0","status":"blocked_pending_refs","purpose":"readiness digest only if bounded refs exist"},{"workflow_id":"post_development_review_gate_v0","status":"required_before_review_claims","purpose":"review gate required for any review-ready claim"}],"optional_downstream_workflows":[{"workflow_id":"knowledge_wiki_pipeline_v0","status":"optional_blocked_pending_safe_inputs","purpose":"knowledge intake only if safe approved materials exist"},{"workflow_id":"source_gap_followup_packet_v0","status":"recommended_for_missing_refs","purpose":"track missing source references and follow-up"},{"workflow_id":"source_packet_sufficiency_review_v0","status":"optional_blocked_pending_source_packet","purpose":"assess sufficiency after source packet exists"},{"workflow_id":"review_gate_evidence_pack_v0","status":"optional_blocked_pending_evidence","purpose":"assemble review evidence if owner later pursues gate review"}],"optional_skill_route":{"skill_id":"se_foldertree_generate","authority":"scaffold_only","status":"pending_owner_binding_and_inputs"}},"owner_input_and_decision_queue":{"missing_required_inputs":["project_code","mission_id","project_local_run_ref","approved_source_refs","accepted_review_gate_packet","accepted_verification_result"],"owner_questions":["What project code should bind this synthetic start?","Is there a mission id to associate with this request?","What project-local run reference should downstream packets use?","Do you want the optional foldertree scaffold, and if so what supported scaffold inputs are approved?","Which source references, if any, are approved for bounded sourcebound follow-up?","Do you want reusable SE template material routing only, without artifact body authoring?","Should missing source refs be handled through an owner queue only, or also through a source-gap follow-up packet?","Do you want a readiness digest request to remain parked until bounded refs exist?"],"owner_decisions_needed":["Confirm project binding before scaffold route.","Confirm whether to create only route packets versus downstream workflow requests.","Confirm whether reusable SE template materials should be surfaced as route targets only.","Confirm whether source/knowledge intake is allowed once safe approved refs exist.","Confirm whether SYN-SRR should remain at gap-scan preparation only."]},"operating_loop_route_map":{"stage_route":{"target_stage":"SYN-SRR","allowed_action":"gap-scan preparation only","blocked_actions":["stage clearance approval","artifact truth authoring","review-ready declaration","verification-complete declaration"]},"scaffold_route":{"status":"pending","rule":"optional and scaffold_only","blockers":["missing project binding","missing supported scaffold inputs"]},"template_material_route":{"status":"route_only","note":"Reusable SE template materials may be identified as downstream route targets, not asserted as delivered content."},"source_knowledge_route":{"status":"blocked_to_gap_or_owner_input","rule":"Missing source refs route to source-gap follow-up or owner queue, not source truth.","blocked_actions":["sourcebound conclusions","knowledge canon promotion","engineering fact invention"]},"readiness_digest_route":{"status":"blocked_pending_bounded_refs","rule":"Digest request may proceed only if bounded refs exist."},"review_closeout_route":{"status":"conditional","rule":"Owner closeout note can be prepared as a non-approval summary; review claims require review workflow and accepted gate outputs."},"blocked_routes":["actual payload storage under _workmeta","private payload copying","runtime absolute path disclosure","project file relocation","verification acceptance","review gate approval"]},"owner_review_closeout_note":{"review_ready_answer":"No observed basis to call this review-ready.","closeout_summary":"Safe next step is to bind the project, capture owner decisions, and prepare a SYN-SRR gap-scan request bundle. Optional scaffold remains pending until binding and supported inputs exist. Readiness digest remains blocked until bounded references exist. Source/knowledge intake remains routed to owner input or source-gap follow-up unless approved refs are supplied.","next_actions":["Provide project_code, mission_id, and project-local run ref.","Decide whether to request the optional scaffold and supply supported scaffold inputs.","Provide approved source refs if any sourcebound follow-up is desired.","Open owner_decision_packet_v0 for route choices and missing-input resolution.","Prepare se_stage_artifact_gap_scan_v0 request for SYN-SRR gap-scan preparation only.","Defer any review-ready or verification-complete language until required downstream review and verification conditions are satisfied."]},"boundary_review_note":{"public_safe":"yes","private_payload_included":"no","host_absolute_paths_included":"no","_workspaces_content_included":"no","_workmeta_payload_storage_claimed":"no","review_or_verification_claims_made":"no","boundary_result":"pass_for_public_safe_synthetic_package"},"completion_state":{"status":"synthetic_public_safe_output_complete","actual_workflow_execution":"not_performed","actual_storage":"not_performed","actual_review_gate":"not_performed","actual_verification":"not_performed"}}
